_comment: build-order's attestation for its own build. Only gates with no static signal are claimed here, and each carries a receipt the reader can open. A static HELD or GAP overrides anything written here — see mergeAttestation.

operator.note: read-only CLI/MCP tool; runs under the invoking user or MCP session identity, holds no credentials of its own and requests none

evidence.note: every input is treated as adversarial: file reads are size-capped, non-text files are skipped, and the attestation file can never satisfy a static detector

tools.note: CLI args are parsed explicitly; the MCP wrapper exposes one typed tool (build_order_audit) with a declared input schema

way-home.note: stateless read-only auditor: nothing to roll back. Its stop condition is exit code 1 on any GAP, which is how it lands with a human in CI
